title: Indias Electricity Production Goes From Contraction To Setting New Record
section_path: Indias Electricity Production Goes From Contraction To Setting New Record
section_path_text: Indias Electricity Production Goes From Contraction To Setting New Record
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
India produced approximately 123.9 billion kilowatt hours of electricity last month, which is up month-on-month by 23 billion kilowatt hours (23%) and up year-on-year by 5.3 billion kilowatt hours (4%). Previously, electricity production had contracted on a year-on-year basis for two straight months. Electricity production last month set a new record (the previous record was 120.8 billion kilowatt hours produced in August).
